2026 PAIZO CATALOG PZOCATALOG 2026 CATALOG 2026 CATALOG 2 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME Pathfinder is one of the most popular and comprehensive tabletop roleplaying games on the planet. Taking place in the fantastic world of Golarion during an era of uncertain prophecy known as the Age of Lost Omens, Pathfinder gives players the chance to play heroes in a vast landscape of danger and adventure! 3 Pathfinder is a full-service RPG, providing players and GMs exciting and ever-evolving options to customize their characters and adventures. The following are some of Pathfinder’s most popular product lines, presented in further detail throughout the rest of this catalog. Beginner Box The perfect introduction to Pathfinder and the best first step in a lifetime journey in fantasy RPGs! Contains dice, pawns, maps, and everything required for weeks of play! Core Rulebooks The remastered Pathfinder Second Edition features four Core Rulebooks—Player Core, GM Core, Monster Core, and Player Core 2. Numerous additional rulebooks offer new classes, monsters, treasures, and additional ways to customize your Pathfinder experience. 4 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME Accessories From GM Screens to spell and monster cards to decks designed to aid rules reference, chases, critical hits and more, Pathfinder offers numerous game aids to speed up play and crank up the fun! Adventures Quarterly Adventure Path releases present entire Pathfinder campaigns, while stand- alone modules ranging widely in level and theme provide near endless adventure designed to challenge and reward your heroic adventurers. The Age of Lost Omens Lost Omens world books present new details and character options rooted in the rich and ever-evolving lore of the world of Golarion—a dangerous realm beset by magic and evil, tottering on a sword’s edge of uncertainty and desperate for the brave actions of adventuring heroes. 5 2026 PATHFINDER RELEASES 6 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME January July Flip-Mat: Primal Dungeon Hell’s Destiny Adventure Path HC, SE Lost Omens: High Seas HC, SE Flip-Mat: Fleet Flagship February Dark Archive (Remastered) HC, SE, SK Season of Ghosts Adventure Path HC, SE Flip-Mat: Boreal Forest Pathfinder Battlecry! Pawn Box August Impossible Magic HC, SE, SK Bastion of Blasphemies Adventure Path HC, SE Flip-Mats: Barfight! Flip-Mat: Dockside Warehouse Pathfinder Dice Gods Dice Game March Monster Core 2 PE Hellbreakers Adventure Path HC, SE Flip-Mat: Grand Mansion Multi-Pack Spellfinder Card Game Novel: Operation Hellmouth September The Dead God’s Hand Adventure HC, SE Flip-Mat: The Dead God’s Hand Multi-Pack April October Monster Core 2 Pawn Box Lost Omens: Hellfire Dispatches HC, SE Flip-Mat: Ravages of War Dark Archive (Remastered) PE Pathfinder Game Night: The Dragon’s Crown Adventure Box Lost Omens: Cheliax, Infernal Inheritance HC, SE Flip-Mat: Haunted Library May November Beginner Box: Secrets of the Unlit Star Troubles in Grayce Adventure Anthology HC, SE Flip-Mat: Training Grounds Feybound HC, SE, SK Impossible Magic PE Vaultlines Adventure Path HC, SE Lost Omens: Cheliax Poster Map Archive Flip-Mat: Crossroads Caverns Novel: Abomination Vaults June Things Go to Hell (Free RPG Day Adventure) Flip-Mat: Wilderness Camps Pathfinder Quest December Flip-Mat: Workshops Multi-Pack ACRONYM KEY: HC hardcover; PE softcover pocket edition; SE special edition; SK sketch cover edition. 7 PATHFINDER BEGINNER BOX: SECRETS OF THE UNLIT STAR Leave the ordinary behind and take your first step into a world of amazing fantasy adventure with the Pathfinder Beginner Box: Secrets of the Unlit Star! This box contains everything you need to learn how to play the Pathfinder roleplaying game, including rules to create your own fantasy hero and tools to tell your own incredible stories. This new version of the Beginner Box revitalizes player options, including more ancestries and four different classes, and includes all-new adventures, maps, and setting details! Will you be a mighty barbarian, cutting down your foes in a furious rage, or a nimble monk, darting in and out of the fray with precise martial arts strikes? Maybe you’ll choose a bard’s music, soothing and supporting your party, or maybe you’ll channel the ancient magic of your bloodline as a powerful sorcerer. It’s all up to you! 8 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME The Pathfinder Beginner Box: Secrets of the Unlit Star includes: • A 72-page Hero’s Handbook, including rules for character generation, a solo adventure, skills, spells, and equipment. • An 88-page Game Master’s Guide, containing an introductory adventure, over 20 pages of monsters, rules for building your own adventure, and magic items. • Four premade characters so you can jump right into the action and four blank character sheets if you want to make your own hero. • Over 100 character and monster pawns to use on the full-color double-sided adventure map. • Four game reference cards to help players remember their actions. • A complete set of polyhedral dice, including a d20, d12, d10, d8, d6, and d4. Pathfinder Beginner Box: Secrets of the Unlit Star (May) ISBN978-1-64078-785-8 PZO12013-BX$49.99 9 10 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME PATHFINDER PLAYER CORE Pathfinder Player Core is the first core rulebook of the fully remastered Pathfinder Second Edition RPG! These rules are compatible with previous Pathfinder Second Edition rulebooks, incorporating comprehensive errata, rules updates, and some of the best additions from later books into new, easier-to-access volumes with new presentations inspired by years of player feedback. Along with the GM Core, Monster Core, and Player Core 2, this 464-page rulebook provides a new foundation for the future of tabletop gaming! Pathfinder Player Core includes: • Easier to learn! We’ve taken feedback from the Beginner Box and the Pathfinder Core Rulebook and made this new entry into the Pathfinder Roleplaying Game easier to navigate and get right into the fun. • Complete character creation rules, walking you through building a character by selecting your Ancestry, Background, and Class, with a focus on the bard, cleric, druid, fighter, ranger, rogue, witch, and wizard! Core ancestry options include human, dwarf, elf, gnome, goblin, halfling, leshy, and orc! • A mountain of options allowing you to customize your character, including versatile heritages, like the changeling and nephilim, skills and feats, and hundreds of spells (including dozens of new ones), ensuring that the character you build represents your hero not just in story, but in rules as well! • Everything you need to know to start playing, from advice on how to explore the world to tips on surviving deadly combat with terrifying foes. • A primer on the Lost Omens setting, so your character can be a part of an exciting and diverse world! • Rules and tools to advance your character through play, taking them from a fresh-faced adventurer ready to take on the world to a veteran hero, wielding powerful magic that can reshape reality! • Fully integrated errata from the first four years of Pathfinder Second Edition, including revisions to the witch, expanded options for every character class, streamlined spells, new equipment, and more! Pathfinder Player Core ISBN978-1-64078-553-3 PZO12001-HC$59.99 Pathfinder Player Core Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-555-7 PZO12001-SK$59.99 Pathfinder Player Core Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-554-0 PZO12001-SE$79.99 Pathfinder Player Core Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-556-4 PZO12001-PE$29.99 11 12 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME PATHFINDER GM CORE Pathfinder GM Core is the second core rulebook for the fully remastered Pathfinder Second Edition RPG! This comprehensive 336-page rulebook gives Game Masters everything they need to craft thrilling tales of adventure, from a single-night’s dungeon delve to complex epics spanning years. Within these pages you’ll find clear guidelines for creating new hazards and monsters, tools to design challenging, balanced encounters, and rules for rewarding characters for overcoming the dastardly obstacles you array before them! Pathfinder GM Core also contains a dragon’s hoard of magic items and treasure to entice and reward your players, from simple healing potions to magic weapons and armor and legendary artifacts, including dozens of brand-new items! Pathfinder GM Core includes: • The rules needed to run a game of Pathfinder, including guidelines for creating challenging encounters, determining success, and giving out rewards. • Advice aimed at making you an incredible Game Master, along with the tools to ensure you and everyone else at your table has a safe and enjoyable experience. • Guidelines to help you create your own content, from campaigns and adventures to hazards and monsters. • Rules subsystems to help you handle a wide array of game situations, including rules for chases, duels, research, infiltration, and more! • A guide to the Lost Omens setting, with a look at several important regions, an examination of the peoples and cultures of the world, and a glimpse into what lies beyond the veil of the Universe! • Fully integrated errata from the first four years of Pathfinder Second Edition, including improvements to staves and talismans and all-new apex magic items! Pathfinder GM Core ISBN978-1-64078-558-8 PZO12002-HC$59.99 Pathfinder GM Core Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-559-5 PZO12002-SK$59.99 Pathfinder GM Core Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-557-1 PZO12002-SE$79.99 Pathfinder GM Core Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-560-1 PZO12002-PE$29.99 13 14 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME PATHFINDER MONSTER CORE Pathfinder Monster Core is the third core rulebook for the fully remastered Pathfinder Second Edition RPG! This 376-page book is packed with a wide range of monsters useful to all Pathfinder campaigns, giving the Game Master plenty of threats to throw at their adventurers, at any level of experience. The lavishly illustrated tome also includes guidelines for reading monster entries and adjusting existing monsters to tailor fit your story! This is the definitive resource for Pathfinder Second Edition monsters! Pathfinder Monster Core includes: • Over 400 individual monster write-ups, including everything from common animals, like wolves and bears, to terrifying supernatural foes, such as the rune giant or the grim reaper! • Eight brand-new dragons to challenge your players, including the power-hungry fortune dragon, the peerless adamantine dragon, the mischievous mirage dragon, the fiendish diabolic dragon, and more! • Classic monsters drawn from mythology, like the minotaur and the medusa, as well as creatures drawn from the legends of the Lost Omens setting, including favorites like the wicked sinspawn and unpredictable proteans. • Simple templates that allow you to customize a monster, making it more or less powerful with just a few simple adjustments. • Guidelines for reading and using monster statistics, ensuring you get the most out of a creature both in and out of combat. • Lists of creatures sorted by both type and level, making it easy to find the monster you need when you need it. • Fully integrated errata from the first four years of Pathfinder Second Edition, including new balance adjustments to ensure that every creature presents a thrilling level-appropriate challenge! • Hundreds of beautiful full-color creature illustrations! Pathfinder Monster Core ISBN978-1-64078-566-3 PZO12003-HC$59.99 Pathfinder Monster Core Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-568-7 PZO12003-SK$59.99 Pathfinder Monster Core Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-567-0 PZO12003-SE$79.99 Pathfinder Monster Core Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-590-8 PZO12003-PE$29.99 15 16 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME PATHFINDER PLAYER CORE 2 Pathfinder Player Core 2 is the fourth core rulebook for the fully remastered Pathfinder Second Edition RPG! This 320-page rulebook significantly expands the options available to Pathfinder players, giving them the edge to take on any adventure. The book remasters 8 classes from Pathfinder Second Edition, providing everything you need to create a wide array of new characters, ready to take on the world. It also includes more than 40 archetypes, expanded ancestries, and tons of feats, spells, and alchemical items to provide a near-endless array of exciting options for every Pathfinder character! The ideal character resource for players looking to move beyond Pathfinder Player Core. Pathfinder Player Core 2 includes: • Eight fully detailed classes, including the alchemist, barbarian, champion, investigator, monk, oracle, sorcerer, and swashbuckler, each containing multiple character paths, multiclassing options, and dozens of feats! • Expanded ancestry options include the catfolk, gnoll, hobgoblin, kobold, lizardfolk, ratfolk, and tengu, alongside three versatile heritages—the dhampir, duskwalker, and an all-new heritage debuting in this volume! • More than 40 archetypes, allowing you to further customize your character’s story and abilities. Turn your hero into an aerial acrobat, a high-riding cavalier, a treacherous pirate, and so much more! • Spells, alchemical items, and magic items to round out the new classes and to provide some new tricks to the classes from Pathfinder Player Core. • Fully integrated errata from the first four years of Pathfinder Second Edition, including a revised alchemist, champion, and oracle! • Published under the new Open RPG Creative (ORC) license, giving players and Game Masters even more freedom for making their own creations based on Pathfinder Second Edition. Pathfinder Player Core 2 ISBN978-1-64078-597-7 PZO12004-HC$59.99 Pathfinder Player Core 2 Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-599-1 PZO12004-SK$59.99 Pathfinder Player Core 2 Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-598-4 PZO12004-SE$79.99 Pathfinder Player Core 2 Pocket Edition ISBN 978-1-64078-622-6 PZO12004-PE$29.99 17 18 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME PATHFINDER MONSTER CORE 2 Despite how far heroes travel or how many times they save the day, there are always new monsters lurking just around the corner. Pathfinder Monster Core 2 is a 376-page hardcover bursting with brand-new creatures as well as updated Pathfinder classics clawing their way to a place at your table. The lavishly illustrated tome also includes guidelines for reading monster entries and adjusting existing monsters to tailor-fit your story! This book is a must- have for Game Masters ready to bring new and exciting challenges to their games! Pathfinder Monster Core 2 includes: • Over 300 individual monsters, including common foes, like dangerous animals and mighty elementals, to deadly creatures that can threaten even the most hardened heroes, such as the unsettling swarm striders and the devastating obcisidaemon! • Eight brand-new dragons to challenge your players, including the powerful cinder dragon, the terrifying despair dragon, the steadfast requiem dragon, the clever rune dragon, and more! • Classic monsters drawn from mythology, like the coatl and the garuda, as well as creatures drawn from the legends of Pathfinder’s Lost Omens setting, including favorites like the majestic dweomercat and the unstoppable Spawn of Rovagug! • Simple templates that allow you to customize a monster, making it more or less powerful with just a few quick adjustments. • Guidelines for reading and using monster statistics, ensuring you get the most out of a creature both in and out of combat. • Lists of creatures sorted by both type and level, making it easy to find the monster you need when you need it. • Fully integrated errata from the first 5 years of Pathfinder Second Edition, including new balance adjustments to ensure that every creature presents a thrilling level-appropriate challenge! • Hundreds of beautiful full-color creature illustrations! Pathfinder Monster Core 2 ISBN978-1-64078-746-9 PZO12009-HC$69.99 Pathfinder Monster Core 2 Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-748-3 PZO12009-SK$69.99 Pathfinder Monster Core 2 Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-747-6 PZO12009-SE$89.99 Pathfinder Monster Core 2 Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-768-1 PZO12009-PE$29.99 19 20 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME PATHFINDER IMPOSSIBLE MAGIC The perfect spell can solve just about any problem. From simple cantrips to reality- warping magic, this new rulebook contains a plethora of options for any adventurer who wants to delve into the unknown and unlock their true magical potential. Within these pages lies the magnificent spellcraft of four wonderfully magical and unique classes! Strike with both spell and blade as a magus. Command an army of the undead as a necromancer. Scribe unique magic onto enemies and allies alike as a runesmith. Fight alongside a powerful magical companion as a summoner. You’ll also find over 240 spells (some so impactful that they scar the soul), several fantastical archetypes that will bring a magical twist to any table, new arcane schools derived from the heart of the Impossible Lands themselves, and wondrous magical items that will allow even the most mundane of characters to experience the power of magic. All of this is made manifest before you with Impossible Magic! Pathfinder Impossible Magic (August) ISBN978-1-64078-807-7 PZO12014-HC$69.99 Pathfinder Impossible Magic Sketch Cover Edition (August) ISBN978-1-64078-809-1 PZO12014-SK$69.99 Pathfinder Impossible Magic Special Edition (August) ISBN978-1-64078-808-4 PZO12014-SE$89.99 Pathfinder Impossible Magic Pocket Edition (November) ISBN978-1-64078-848-0 PZO12014-PE$29.99 21 22 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME PATHFINDER FEYBOUND Step through the veil into the grandest party of two worlds. At the Yestereve Revels, every kind of fey from lowly gremlin to towering warrior of the Wild Hunt joins the merrymaking. Speak to a fey queen to receive a boon, sling mud with the grimiest muckdwellers, and savor the taste of a decadent berry pie—even if it means you may never leave. Every delight can be had at the Yestereve Revels! At the gala and beyond, players and GMs can use creatures, items, archetypes and more inspired by fey and fairy tales. Cast curses, transformations, and memory magic! Be inspired by a trickster muse for bards! Ride a unicorn! Play fey ancestries—fauns, gremlins, nymphs, and sprites—or choose the fadrim versatile heritage to add a bit of fey magic to any character. Explore the world of the fey! Feybound also includes a gazetteer of the First World, a first draft of the Universe the fey call home, and expanded details on the godlike beings called the Eldest. Pathfinder Feybound (November) ISBN978-1-64078-834-3 PZO12015-HC$64.99 Pathfinder Feybound Sketch Cover Edition (November) ISBN978-1-64078-836-7 PZO12015-SK$64.99 Pathfinder Feybound Special Edition (November) ISBN978-1-64078-835-0 PZO12015-SE$84.99 23 PATHFINDER WAR OF IMMORTALS A god has been slain, and nothing shall ever be the same again! As war and destruction spread across the land, new heroes must rise to the occasion and take up arms to protect the mortal world. Lay claim to your own spark of divinity with two brand-new character classes: charge into battle as a mighty exemplar, or call upon the power of spiritual allies as a wise animist. Alongside these new classes are rules for running mythic games, archetypes for playing legendary characters, and a wide array of new items, spells, and monsters to tell stories straight out of myth. Claim the power of the gods, and battle the Universe’s most fearsome foes with War of Immortals! Pathfinder War of Immortals ISBN978-1-64078-619-6 PZO12006-HC$67.49 Pathfinder War of Immortals Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-621-9 PZO12006-SK$67.49 Pathfinder War of Immortals Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-620-2 PZO12006-SE$87.49 Pathfinder War of Immortals Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-638-7 PZO12006-PE$29.99 24 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME PATHFINDER NPC CORE Steadfast allies, cunning enemies, and good old shopkeepers—NPC Core brings the people of your game world to life. Prepare and run your games faster with a vast collection of non-player characters ready to go at a moment’s notice. Special characters from notable ancestries show off the unique themes of their cultures. You’ll also find fun details to inspire your specific NPCs, along with extra tools like familiars, companions, ready-to-use spell lists, and NPC relationship rules! Populate your world with NPC Core! Pathfinder NPC Core ISBN978-1-64078-649-3 PZO12007-HC$69.99 Pathfinder NPC Core Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-660-8 PZO12007-SK$69.99 Pathfinder NPC Core Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-650-9 PZO12007-SE$89.99 Pathfinder NPC Core Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-670-7 PZO12007-PE$29.99 25 PATHFINDER BATTLECRY! Report for duty! When diplomacy between nations fails and neither side wishes to back down, war is the inevitable result. From border skirmishes to large-scale invasions, conflict comes in many forms— the perfect chance for heroes to win glory! This new rulebook covers all aspects of war, including two bold new character classes! Help steer the flow of battle as a cunning commander, or protect your allies from harm as an indomitable guardian. You’ll also find archetypes that allow you to raise a small battalion of undead soldiers or wield a personal siege weapon, a new larger-than-life ancestry, an armory of magic weapons, and rules for running combat alongside troops that you command to fill out your army’s ranks. Golarion’s generals need you, so heed the Battlecry! Pathfinder Battlecry! ISBN978-1-64078-691-2 PZO12008-HC$64.99 Pathfinder Battlecry! Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-693-6 PZO12008-SK$64.99 Pathfinder Battlecry! Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-692-9 PZO12008-SE$84.99 Pathfinder Battlecry! Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-717-9 PZO12008-PE$29.99 26 PATHFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME PATHFINDER GUNS & GEARS (Remastered) If sword and spell aren’t enough to win the day, it’s time to level up your game with clockwork gears, lightning coils, and black powder! Guns & Gears brings the excitement of firearms and fantasy technology to your tabletop! Unravel the secrets of clockworks with the new inventor class or blow away your opposition as a firearm-wielding gunslinger! In addition to these new classes, a plethora of archetypes, backgrounds, vehicles, siege engines, gadgets, and the new automaton ancestry are all ready to expand your game with options for battlefields large and small. Fully remastered to the latest version of the Pathfinder RPG! Pathfinder Guns & Gears (Remastered) ISBN978-1-64078-643-1 PZO12010-HC$69.99 Pathfinder Guns & Gears (Remastered) Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-661-5 PZO12010-SK$69.99 Pathfinder Guns & Gears (Remastered) Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-644-8 PZO12010-SE$89.99 Pathfinder Guns & Gears (Remastered) Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-667-7 PZO12010-PE$29.99 27 PATHFINDER TREASURE VAULT (Remastered) Pathfinder Treasure Vault reveals the glittering hoard of a terrifying dragon, as presented by the creature’s plucky kobold assistant. This 224-page rulebook presents a catalog of new gear from nearly every category of equipment and magic item available in the Pathfinder RPG while also introducing entirely new categories of items as well—nearly 600 new items in all! Give your character the perfect tool for the job with signature weapons, customizable relics, and wondrous items to fit your every need while preparing for any eventuality with potions, elixirs, wands, and more! Fully remastered to the latest version of the Pathfinder RPG! Pathfinder Dark Archive contains secrets that any player or GM can use to reveal the paranormal lurking in their Pathfinder games! This spine-tinglingly secretive 224-page rulebook presents two new character classes perfect for delving into the unexplained: Unleash the untold power of your mind as the psychic, or leverage supernatural secrets and mystic implements as the thaumaturge! With this set of 54 full-color, fortune-telling cards, you’ll learn how to include the harrow in any tabletop RPG game and enhance play with immersive fortune-telling methods and other insights. With vivid all-new art, exciting print treatments, patterned backing, and a size common to many real-world tarot decks, the Harrow Deck straddles the line between game supplement and storytelling set piece! Each pawn slots into a size-appropriate plastic base, making them easy to mix with traditional metal or plastic miniatures. Pathfinder Remaster: Divine Spell Cards ISBN978-1-64078-614-1 PZO10005-MC$27.99 Pathfinder Remaster: Occult Spell Cards ISBN978-1-64078-615-8 PZO10006-MC$32.99 Pathfinder Remaster: Focus Spell Cards ISBN978-1-64078-616-5 PZO10007-MC$27.99 37 PATHFINDER CONDITION CARD DECK These 108 cards include rules for the Pathfinder Second Edition conditions, with prominent reminder text you can read at a glance. Multiple copies of the most crucial conditions mean there are enough for the whole table, and a set of tracking cards lets you easily monitor condition values and durations! Pathfinder Condition Card Deck ISBN978-1-64078-178-8 PZO2204$22.99 38 PATHFINDER ACCESSORIES Other Pathfinder Card Decks Pathfinder Adventure Gear Deck ISBN978-1-64078-207-5 PZO2216$22.99 Pathfinder Alchemy Deck ISBN978-1-64078-381-2 PZO2228$22.99 Pathfinder Chase Deck ISBN978-1-64078-225-9 PZO2217$14.99 Pathfinder Critical Fumble Deck ISBN978-1-64078-190-0 PZO2206$12.99 Pathfinder Critical Hit Deck ISBN978-1-64078-189-4 PZO2205$12.99 Pathfinder Deck of Endless NPCs ISBN978-1-64078-438-3 PZO2229$24.99 Pathfinder Deck of Endless Treasure ISBN978-1-64078-680-6 PZO10010-MC$29.99 Pathfinder Gears Deck ISBN978-1-64078-405-5 PZO2231$22.99 Pathfinder Guns Deck ISBN978-1-64078-404-8 PZO2230$22.99 Pathfinder Hero Point Deck ISBN978-1-64078-306-5 PZO2223$14.99 Pathfinder Magic Armaments Deck ISBN978-1-64078-300-3 PZO2222$22.99 Pathfinder Potions & Talismans Deck ISBN978-1-60478-328-7 PZO2224$22.99 Pathfinder Relics Deck ISBN978-1-64078-476-5 PZO2234$22.99 Pathfinder Weapons & Armor Deck ISBN978-1-64078-220-4 PZO2209$22.99 39 40 PATHFINDER ADVENTURES HELLBREAKERS ADVENTURE PATH As the Hellfire Crisis dawns and spreads its turmoil throughout Avistan, the nation of Isger is stirred to action by the rebel organization the Hellbreakers League, which seeks to free Isger from its oppressor, the infernal nation of Cheliax. Player characters will carry out daring missions against Chelaxian strongholds, face off with the deadly Hellknights, and strike out against the forces of Hell itself! On the way, they’ll run into dangerous enemies both new and old and uncover long-lost secrets powerful and ancient. Can the PCs stoke the fires of revolution and throw off the diabolic chains of Cheliax or will they be ground beneath the boot of oppression? Join the Hellbreakers and do your part! A complete Pathfinder campaign for levels 1 to 10! Includes a gazetteer of the lands and people that make up the nation of Isger and a look into the cults of Urgathoa, as well as useful new items, exciting character options, and a host of dangerous monsters. Hellbreakers Adventure Path ISBN978-1-64078-769-8 PZO15222-HC$79.99 Hellbreakers Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-770-4 PZO15222-SE$99.99 41 42 PATHFINDER ADVENTURES HELL’S DESTINY ADVENTURE PATH War between the hell-sworn nation of Cheliax and its old enemy Andoran ripples across the Inner Sea. Yet Cheliax’s greatest foe might be its own long- oppressed people—including several heroes trapped there when Cheliax declares martial law and seals its borders. These heroes won’t just free themselves; they’ll unite the infernal empire’s worst enemies to defeat Cheliax on land, by sea, and even to the depths of Hell itself! Hell’s Destiny is a complete Adventure Path designed for four characters, starting at 10th level and reaching 20th level by the campaign’s conclusion. Hell’s Destiny also includes a gazetteer of the dynamic port city of Corentyn, an exploration into Cheliax’s diabolical aristocracy, as well as useful new items, exciting character options, and a host of dangerous monsters. Hell’s Destiny Adventure Path (July) ISBN978-1-64078-799-5 PZO15223-HC$79.99 Hell’s Destiny Special Edition (July) ISBN978-1-64078-800-8 PZO15223-SE$99.99 43 44 PATHFINDER ADVENTURES BASTION OF BLASPHEMIES ADVENTURE PATH Florin Kindler lost her parents to one of Ustalav’s most notorious hauntings—they perished, as so many have, after a visit from the Black Coach of Bastardhall. Arguably the most notorious of all the haunted castles in the Inner Sea region, Bastardhall’s mysteries have brought Florin and her adventuring companions in search of answers to the centuries‑long curse that blights the ruins, but the castle has other plans than simply giving up is secrets, as those who dare to enter its haunted halls are doomed to vanish forever. Will your PCs be able to break the curse of Bastardhall and escape, or are they fated to become the latest in a long line of vanishings into one of Golarion’s most infamous ruins? The Bastion of Blasphemies Adventure Path is a complete Pathfinder campaign by Pathfinder co-creator James Jacobs, with adventures ranging from level 5 to 13, making it the perfect follow-up for players who have finished the Troubles in Grayce Adventure Anthology. Bastion of Blasphemies Adventure Path (August) ISBN978-1-64078-810-7 PZO15224-HC$79.99 Bastion of Blasphemies Special Edition (August) ISBN978-1-64078-811-4 PZO15224-SE$99.99 45 46 PATHFINDER ADVENTURES VAULTLINES ADVENTURE PATH Trouble rumbles in the Darklands beneath the world’s surface! Ley lines twisted by the godlike vault builders ages ago have begun to unwind, devastating subterranean communities. These vaultlines shake all the Darklands, from the claustrophobic tunnels of Nar-Voth to the wondrous caverns of Sekamina and the continent-sized vaults of Orv. Meanwhile, patient and cunning serpentfolk seize on the chaos to finally wrest control of the world from humanity, the hated foes who drove them into the darkness long ago. Your PCs escape a dire fate during a subterranean prison break, but a powerful villain intent on dominating the lands below and above the surface is freed as well. Now you must race through the monster-infested Darklands, from claustrophobic tunnels to jungle-filled hidden worlds, pursuing an enemy connected to an ageless evil. Schemes of the ancient vault builders and Yig, the Father of Serpents, are now unearthed. Can you untangle sinister plots and ancient rivalries set into motion before human reckoning? The vault builders may have formed the Cradle of the Darklands long ago, but you will decide who rules it! The Vaultlines Adventure Path is a complete Pathfinder campaign for 11th- to 20th-level characters. Vaultlines Adventure Path (November) ISBN978-1-64078-837-4 PZO15225-HC$79.99 Vaultlines Special Edition (November) ISBN978-1-64078-838-1 PZO15225-SE$99.99 47 48 PATHFINDER ADVENTURES SEASON OF GHOSTS ADVENTURE PATH Something strange is happening to your hometown of Willowshore! Nestled on the banks of a river winding through the legendary Specterwood in Tian Xia’s haunted land of Shenmen, the people of Willowshore are no strangers to supernatural threats, but the danger that comes to town on the first day of summer is unlike anything you’ve ever seen before. Over the four seasons to come, you and your fellow home- grown heroes must face evil spirits, sinister fiends, and frightening curses, lest the town of Willowshore succumb to the Season of Ghosts! The Season of Ghosts Adventure Path is a four-part series of connected adventures that form a complete Pathfinder horror campaign ranging from level 1 to 12. Season of Ghosts Adventure Path ISBN978-1-64078-765-0 PZO14008-HC$79.99 Season of Ghosts Adventure Path Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-766-7 PZO14008-SE$99.99 49 GATEWALKERS ADVENTURE PATH After they walked through that glowing gateway, nothing was ever the same. A band of characters becomes paranormal investigators in order to figure out the cause of a global amnesiac episode. Their quest takes them to lands near, far, and outside this reality altogether. Along the way, the characters meet fellow “gatewalkers,” defeat alien monsters, and explore strange realms also touched by the so-called Missing Moment. And when it comes time to learn the grim truth of what happened to them on that fated summer night, what then? The Gatewalkers Adventure Path is a three-part series of connected adventures that form a complete Pathfinder campaign ranging from level 1 to 11. Pathfinder Gatewalkers Adventure Path Hardcover ISBN978-1-64078-681-3 PZO14005-HC$69.99 Pathfinder Gatewalkers Adventure Path Hardcover Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-682-0 PZO14005-SE$89.99 50 PATHFINDER ADVENTURES KINGMAKER ADVENTURE PATH The Kingmaker Adventure Path presents a full-length campaign that chronicles the rise of a new nation—a kingdom built and ruled by your player characters! Face off against bands of bloodthirsty bandits, deadly and dangerous monsters, and mysterious menaces from other realities as you fight to claim the Stolen Lands as your own. Will you rule with justice and mercy, or will you become the very monsters you fought to oppose? In the Kingmaker Adventure Path, the destiny of the world’s newest nation is yours to decide! The Kingmaker Adventure Path is a six-part series of connected adventures that form a complete Pathfinder campaign ranging from level 1 to 20. Kingmaker Adventure Path Hardcover ISBN978-1-64078-429-1 PZO2020$99.99 Kingmaker Kingdom Management Screen ISBN978-1-64078-432-1 PZO2022$24.99 Kingmaker Kingdom Tracker Folio ISBN978-1-64078-435-2 PZO2024$24.99 Kingmaker Bestiary Hardcover (Pathfinder First Edition) ISBN978-1-64078-431-4 PZO2021$44.99 Kingmaker Companion Guide ISBN978-1-64078-4338 PZO2023$39.99 Kingmaker Poster Map Folio ISBN978-1-64078-4376 PZO2026$24.99 Kingmaker Pawn Box ISBN978-1-64078-4154 PZO2027$59.99 Kingmaker Flip-Mat: Campsite Multi-Pack ISBN978-1-64078-416-1 PZO2028$29.99 Kingmaker Flip-Mat: Noble Manor Multi-Pack ISBN978-1-64078-417-8 PZO2029$29.99 Kingmaker Flip-Mat: River Kingdoms Ruins Multi-Pack ISBN978-1-64078-418-5 PZO2030$29.99 51 ABOMINATION VAULTS ADVENTURE PATH Enter the megadungeon! Evil stirs in the depths of the Abomination Vaults, a sprawling dungeon where the evil sorcerer Belcorra Haruvex attempted to raise an army of monsters hundreds of years ago. Brave heroes must venture into a dungeon full of beasts and traps to prevent a spiteful villain from rising again! The Abomination Vaults Adventure Path is a three-part series of connected adventures that form a complete Pathfinder campaign ranging from level 1 to 11. Abomination Vaults Adventure Path Hardcover ISBN978-1-64078-410-9 PZO2033$54.99 Abomination Vaults Adventure Path Special Edition Hardcover ISBN978-1-64078-411-6 PZO2033-SE$74.99 Abomination Vaults Battle Cards ISBN978-1-64078-472-7 PZO2232$39.99 52 PATHFINDER ADVENTURES FISTS OF THE RUBY PHOENIX ADVENTURE PATH The time has come again for the Ruby Phoenix Tournament! The sorcerer Hao Jin has invited only the strongest martial artists, adventurers, and fortune seekers to her world-famous fighting competition. A motley roster of contenders must compete for this decade’s champion title and their choice of one of the Ruby Phoenix’s grand treasures. Who will come out on top, and who will be left in the dust? There’s only one way to find out! The Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Adventure Path is a three-part series of connected adventures that form a complete Pathfinder campaign ranging from level 11 to 20. Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Adventure Path Hardcover ISBN978-1-64078-490-1 PZO2035$54.99 Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Pawn Collection ISBN978-1-64078-360-7 PZO1045$24.99 53 PATHFINDER GAME NIGHT: DAWN OF THE FROGS Gather your friends for the perfect taste of the Pathfinder RPG with this deluxe boxed set adventure designed specifically for brand new players! The small village of Bog Bottom has a problem—locals have been going missing near an old, abandoned mill in the surrounding swamp known as Dunmire. But what awaits discovery in this ruin is far more sinister than a few wayward villagers—Bog Bottom is going to need a new band of heroes if it hopes to survive the upcoming Dawn of the Frogs! Pathfinder Game Night: Dawn of the Frogs presents three short adventures for 1st- level characters set in the swamp of Dunmire and includes four pregenerated player characters, poster maps presenting all combat locations, a sheet of pawns representing the PCs and enemies, dice, and a 32-page adventure book! Pathfinder Game Night: Dawn of the Frogs ISBN978-1-64078-740-7 PZO14006-BX$34.99 54 PATHFINDER ADVENTURES PATHFINDER GAME NIGHT: THE DRAGON’S CROWN Take your first steps into a world of high adventure with this deluxe boxed set adventure designed specifically for brand new players! Not all dragons are mighty and cruel. Some are small and friendly, but even the tiniest dragons covet their wealth. So when a house drake’s beloved crown is stolen by a pesky imp who leaves her for dead after a fight atop the rooftops of the city of Korvosa, it falls to a fresh-faced band of heroes to step in and save the day! But who could have guessed that a frantic chase after a thieving imp over city roofs could lead to a mission against one of the neighborhood’s newest crime lords—the mysterious (and likely awful) King Stankus? Can you face threats that span from Korvosa’s heights to its rancid sewer depths and emerge with the dragon’s crown? This box contains everything you need to play three short single-night adventures for 1st-level heroes and includes four pregenerated player characters, poster maps presenting all combat locations, a sheet of pawns representing the PCs and enemies, dice, and a 32-page adventure book! Pathfinder Game Night: The Dragon’s Crown (October) ISBN978-1-64078-827-5 PZO14011-BX$34.99 55 TROUBLES IN GRAYCE ADVENTURE ANTHOLOGY The perfect next step after the Beginner Box! The idyllic calm in the hardworking town of Grayce has been shaken by recent events and its people need help. Thankfully, a group of adventurers recently arrived in town, fresh off their first adventure! This action-packed anthology of six short adventures deeply immerses players in the town introduced in the Beginner Box, setting a light horror tone that calls for heroism. The anthology includes a dangerous cryptid hunt, the exploration of a sinister scientist’s abandoned home, the devious and deadly plot of a hidden hag, and even tracking down a murderous vampire! Each adventure includes a level’s worth of experience and can be played independently or as part of a larger connected story that leads to the Bastion of Blasphemies Adventure Path! Troubles in Grayce Adventure Anthology (May) ISBN978-1-64078-786-5 PZO14009-HC$44.99 Troubles in Grayce Special Edition (May) ISBN978-1-64078-787-2 PZO14009-SE$64.99 56 PATHFINDER ADVENTURES THE DEAD GOD’S HAND Delve into ancient secrets below the City at the Center of the World in this hardcover campaign-arc adventure for characters level 1–7! Captured by a hryngar clan somewhere in the maze of tunnels below the city of Absalom, the heroes stage a bloody revolt and battle their way into the long-lost Sanctum of Aroden, a legendary religious refuge sealed away from the world with the god of humanity’s death a century ago. But some secrets are best left buried forever, and investigation into the mysterious Dead God’s Hand, said to be hidden at the heart of the complex, uncovers machinations that could threaten all of Absalom with the birth of a terrible new divinity! Based on Pathfinder Publisher Erik Mona’s multi-year, multi-group office Pathfinder campaign, The Dead God’s Hand is a deadly adventure filled with dungeon exploration, ancient mysteries, and phantasmagoric tests that see the player characters reliving events from the life of Aroden, the dead god of humanity whose murder triggered the beginning of the current age! The Dead God’s Hand (September) ISBN978-1-64078-821-3 PZO14007-HC$49.99 The Dead God’s Hand Special Edition (September) ISBN978-1-64078-822-0 PZO14007-SE$69.99 Pathfinder Flip-Mat: The Dead God’s Hand Multi-Pack (September) ISBN978-1-64078-823-7 PZO11042-FM$29.99 57 CROWN OF THE KOBOLD KING The town of Falcon’s Hollow is no stranger to peril, yet the danger growing nearby poses a threat that only a new band of heroes can handle. Ravenous undead, cunning kobolds, and sinister necromancers are but a few of the menaces facing the small lumber town, yet none are as dangerous as the Kobold King himself! This deluxe 128-page hardcover gathers three classic Pathfinder adventures into an unforgettable compilation, updating them to Pathfinder Second Edition and expanding them into a mini-campaign with a brand-new dungeon for heroes to explore. Will your heroes save Falcon’s Hollow from the Kobold King, or are they doomed to become the king’s latest trophies? Crown of the Kobold King is a deluxe super- adventure designed for characters level 1–6. Crown of the Kobold King ISBN978-1-64078-452-9 PZO9562$39.99 Pathfinder Flip-Mat: Crown of the Kobold King ISBN978-1-64078-454-3 PZO30123$16.99 58 PATHFINDER ADVENTURES CLAWS OF THE TYRANT Claws of the Tyrant is a hardcover anthology of three interconnected adventures set in the ravaged nation of Lastwall, now known as the Gravelands. “Gravelands Survivors” (1st level) follows a group of refugees as they race to keep a holy artifact from the clutches of a vile graveknight. In “Ashes for Ozem” (7th level), the players are evil agents assembled by the graveknight to infiltrate a stronghold of good and destroy it from within. In “Of Blood and Faith” (18th level), the Knights of Lastwall and their allies prepare for a final confrontation to end the graveknight’s machinations once and for all. Claws of the Tyrant ISBN978-1-64078-656-1 PZO14003-HC$44.99 59 A WORLD OF ADVENTURE! From the crumbling spires of the ancient runelords in distant Varisia to the bustling merchant kingdoms of the Inner Sea, Pathfinder’s Lost Omens campaign setting forms the panoramic backdrop for Paizo’s innovative Pathfinder fantasy roleplaying supplements, adventures, and novels. Golarion is a world beset by danger. To the north, the undead armies of the Whispering Tyrant converge into a massive army, their loose jaws slavering for the flesh of the living, while long-simmering tensions between the nations of Andoran, Taldor, and Cheliax threaten to bloom into open warfare. In the east, guillotine blades fall daily amid the eternal revolutions of Galt, while to the west the thrice-damned House of Thrune rules a great diabolical empire in dangerous decline. And at the heart of it all rises Absalom, City at the Center of the World, where anything can be bought and sold and the Pathfinder Society seeks adventurous new recruits to seek out the lost treasures and hidden secrets of the world... 60 PATHFINDER LOST OMENS CAMPAIGN SETTING LOST OMENS WORLD GUIDE This indispensable 136-page hardcover guidebook to the world of Pathfinder presents everything you need to know for a lifetime of adventure in the uncertain Age of Lost Omens. The god of humanity is dead and prophecy is broken, leaving adventuring heroes like you to carve their own destinies out of an uncertain future! This gazetteer features 10 diverse regions packed with thrilling and deadly possibilities and is accompanied by a giant two-sided poster map depicting the heart of the Pathfinder setting. Detailed character backgrounds for each region root your character even more deeply into the campaign setting. It’s the perfect starting place for newcomers to Pathfinder and the most concise, up-to-date presentation of the Age of Lost Omens for Pathfinder Second Edition. Lost Omens World Guide ISBN978-1-64078-172-6 PZO9301$36.99 Lost Omens World Guide Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-447-5 PZO9301-SE$62.99 61 LOST OMENS DRACONIC CODEX Dragons! The very name invokes power beyond reckoning, fire that can melt mountains, and fangs the size of swords. To face a dragon is to face the ultimate challenge of any adventurer’s career. The reward for victory: gold, enough to twist any mortal’s heart into a bigger monster than the one they just slew. Inside this 224-page tome lies the secrets of dragonkind, as well as those mortals who look upon them with awe or bitter envy. Research a fearsome foe or summon the courage to make an ally of these primordial beings and put your strength and wisdom to the test. Success will see triumph beyond measure, while failure leads to an ignominious end within the dragon’s maw! Lost Omens Draconic Codex ISBN978-1-64078-749-0 PZO13007-HC$64.99 Lost Omens Draconic Codex Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-750-6 PZO13007-SE$84.99 62 PATHFINDER LOST OMENS CAMPAIGN SETTING LOST OMENS HELLFIRE DISPATCHES A single spark has ignited the dry tinder of decades- long saber-rattling into the full-fledged inferno of the Hellfire Crisis, embroiling an entire region in the war between infernal Cheliax and its former holding, Andoran. Dispatches from each front reveal the past and present of the war, along with how the right group of heroes might shape the future of the conflict. In addition to news of the war and fronts where heroes might win important victories, this 128-page setting sourcebook provides new options for factions involved in the conflict. The Eagle Knights loyal to Andoran and the Hellknights divided by Cheliax’s wartime demands were there when the first blows were struck. Others were pulled in as the crisis spread to their homes, from shadowy Nidal to the halls of power in Absalom and from the already-bloody forests of Nirmathas to settlements beneath the Inner Sea. Lost Omens Hellfire Dispatches (April) ISBN978-1-64078-779-7 PZO13008-HC$44.99 Lost Omens Hellfire Dispatches Special Edition (April) ISBN978-1-64078-780-3 PZO13008-SE$64.99 63 LOST OMENS HIGH SEAS Set a course for grand adventures with this expansive hardcover guide to the open waters of the Inner Sea. Since time immemorial, the people of Golarion have been traveling out to the sea to gather resources, ply their trades, and seek secrets both above and below the water. Explore the failed utopia of the island of Hermea, the home of deadly Red Mantis assassins on Mediogalti Island, the mysteries of the Mordant Spire grown from the remains of a dead god, the countless pirate-scoured islands of the Shackles, or the dangerous depths of underwater regions. Each entry within this gazetteer includes the history, culture, and current events of the region, as well as a major city to include in a variety of adventures. The book also includes new character options and a fold-out poster map! Lost Omens High Seas (July) ISBN978-1-64078-804-6 PZO13009-HC$44.99 Lost Omens High Seas Special Edition (July) ISBN978-1-64078-805-3 PZO13009-SE$64.99 64 PATHFINDER LOST OMENS CAMPAIGN SETTING LOST OMENS CHELIAX, INFERNAL INHERITANCE As the Hellfire Crisis comes to an end, the powers that be must reckon with a changed world. Within the Infernal Inheritance dwell scheming nobles, remnants of ancient empires, and diabolic dangers. Explore Cheliax, a devil-bound nation transformed by war; Corentyn, a naval power establishing its militaristic and economical might; Isger, a recently liberated nation discovering its forgotten past; Nidal, a nation wreathed in shadow and bound to a wicked god; Ravounel, a former Chelaxian holding that’s seeking its own place in the world; and Scorchhome, a nation for goblins and other outcasts. Each entry within this gazetteer includes the history, culture, and current events of the region, as well as a major city to include in a variety of adventures. The book also includes new character options and a fold-out poster map! Lost Omens Cheliax, Infernal Inheritance (October) ISBN978-1-64078-828-2 PZO13010-HC$64.99 Lost Omens Cheliax, Infernal Inheritance Special Edition (October) ISBN978-1-64078-829-9 PZO13010-SE$84.99 Lost Omens Cheliax Poster Map Archive (November) ISBN978-1-64078-839-8 PZO13011-MC$29.99 65 LOST OMENS SHINING KINGDOMS Explore a region of classical high fantasy with this expansive hardcover guide to six key nations of the Inner Sea. Within the Shining Kingdoms dwell noble knightly orders, proud ancient cultures, and deadly courtly intrigue. Explore Andoran, a bastion of democratic governance and freedom for all; Druma, a trade hub obsessed with material gain; the Five Kings Mountains, home to the fractured kingdoms of the dwarves; Galt, a land wracked from violence and revolution; Kyonin, the illusion-cloaked homeland of the elves; and Taldor, the ossified remnants of one of the most powerful empires in the Inner Sea. Each nation features an in-depth history, gazetteer, and a look at a major city to support a grand variety of adventures. The book also includes new character options and a fold-out poster map! Lost Omens Shining Kingdoms ISBN978-1-64078-676-9 PZO13005-HC$59.99 Lost Omens Shining Kingdoms Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-677-6 PZO13005-SE$79.99 Lost Omens Shining Kingdoms Poster Map Archive ISBN978-1-64078-684-4 PZO13006-MC$29.99 66 PATHFINDER LOST OMENS CAMPAIGN SETTING LOST OMENS RIVAL ACADEMIES Investigate the demon-haunted Sarkoris Scar and gather the wisdom of its scattered people in a convocation of the finest minds of the Age of Lost Omens! Adventure and research sites around the Sarkoris Scar are presented by local experts. The fascinating variety of visiting scholars likewise speaks to possibilities from joint research and lifelong bonds to political machinations and bitter rivalries. These visitors have each brought their own items, spells, and other research, including the remastered runelord archetype. Learn from the best in this content-packed sourcebook for players and GMs! Lost Omens Rival Academies ISBN978-1-64078-652-3 PZO13004-HC$44.99 Lost Omens Rival Academies Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-653-0 PZO13004-SE$64.99 67 LOST OMENS DIVINE MYSTERIES This 320-page hardcover resource for both players and Game Masters is a comprehensive look at all things divine, making it an essential addition to any Pathfinder Second Edition campaign and a remastered update and expansion of the popular volume Lost Omens Gods & Magic! The book updates domains, spells, and other mechanics. These include expansions on existing classes like new witch patrons, new archetypes like the Rivethun emissary and powerful mortal herald, and new class archetypes like the battle harbinger option for clerics. The book also includes brand new character options and several additional divine entities never before explored in any Pathfinder reference! Lost Omens Divine Mysteries ISBN978-1-64078-624-0 PZO13003-HC$79.99 Lost Omens Divine Mysteries Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-625-7 PZO13003-SE$99.99 68 PATHFINDER LOST OMENS CAMPAIGN SETTING LOST OMENS IMPOSSIBLE LANDS In a land still scarred by a war between two undying archmages and their respective nations, reality defies the rules binding the rest of the world. Cities crafted by wishes and fields harvested by the walking dead lay astride lands where magic warps and twists with an undefinable will. Explore the history of immortal wizard-kings, wield explosive and unusual technology, and channel awe-inspiring legends in a region where the present is still haunted by the past, and echoes of destruction still shudder across the minds and souls of those who brave the Impossible Lands! A 344-page hardcover sourcebook for Pathfinder Second Edition. Lost Omens Impossible Lands ISBN978-1-64078-480-2 PZO9314$59.99 Lost Omens Impossible Lands Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-481-9 PZO9314-SE$79.99 69 LOST OMENS TIAN XIA WORLD GUIDE Dragons once served as the stewards of the lands of Tian Xia, commanded by Heavenly decree. Can you live up to their lofty expectations, or will you flounder and fail like countless kingdoms before you? Prophecy is dead and history hangs on a feather; even the slightest breath might change the course of peoples and nations. Strike out and seize your destiny in an uncertain future! This massive 304-page gazetteer features a look at the history, cultures, and peoples of Tian Xia, with summaries of over 20 distinct nations and kingdoms on, above, and under the continent. It’s accompanied by a giant poster map displaying this region of the Pathfinder setting in beautiful detail. Lost Omens Tian Xia World Guide ISBN978-1-64078-576-2 PZO13001-HC$79.99 Lost Omens Tian Xia World Guide Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-577-9 PZO13001-SE$99.99 70 PATHFINDER LOST OMENS CAMPAIGN SETTING LOST OMENS TIAN XIA CHARACTER GUIDE The boundless continent of Tian Xia features innumerable peoples, each with their own rich history and practices. Bring your character to life with this 136-page hardcover guidebook crammed full of everything a player might need to build a hero hailing from or journeying through these vast lands, including: • Six new ancestries, including the reincarnating samsaran, trickster tanuki, and shadowy wayang, as well as Tian-inspired additional feats and heritages for existing ancestries, like the peachchild leshy, bakuwa lizardfolk, and gandharva sprite! • Feats inspired by Tian Xia’s diverse arts and practices, from new elemental medicine to alchemically fortified cuisine to how the zodiac can guide your character’s path. • Spectacular magical and martial techniques to vanquish the toughest opponents, whether that’s through weightless sword arts or by borrowing the ancient power of magical familiars. • Dazzling new magic items and weapons to forge or find, from the subtle kotodama whistle to legendary artifacts like the staff of Sun Wukong. Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide ISBN978-1-64078-579-3 PZO13002-HC$47.49 Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-580-9 PZO13002-SE$67.49 71 LOST OMENS ABSALOM, CITY OF LOST OMENS For nearly 5,000 years, the great city of Absalom has stood at the center of the Inner Sea region’s culture, commerce, and prophecy. Now, after the death of its founder-god Aroden, the disappearance of its lord mayor, and new attacks from some of its greatest foes, Absalom stands at the crossroads of a new and uncertain destiny! This lore-packed 400-page hardcover guide presents a fascinating locale suitable for years of Pathfinder adventures! A huge poster map of the city, more than 250 locations, and more than 400 interconnected NPCs set the scene in unprecedented detail, beckoning your characters to walk upon streets paved with centuries of history. Follow in the footsteps of generations of questing heroes to chart a new path for the City at the Center of the World! Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens ISBN978-1-64078-235-8 PZO9304$54.99 Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-531-1 PZO9304-SE$89.99 Lost Omens City of Lost Omens Poster Map Folio ISBN978-1-64078-242-6 PZO9305$24.99 72 PATHFINDER LOST OMENS CAMPAIGN SETTING LOST OMENS MWANGI EXPANSE South of a forbidding range of mountain peaks lies a land of boundless resources and untold opportunity. The Mwangi Expanse has been home to a wide variety of cultures and peoples since time immemorial, hosting powerful, isolated city-states that have often paid little attention to their neighbors. Yet the turning tides of fortune have begun to usher in changes that are rippling across the world—a band of scholars from an ancient university venture north to aid a disaster-torn Avistan. A revolution-forged nation seeks powerful allies against foreign aggression. An undead god, once a symbol of hope to his declining nation, now grows jealous enough to turn on his self-proclaimed kin. Whether you’re a diplomat seeking leverage from the most difficult of positions, a spy searching for the subtlest hint of danger from your surroundings, a guardian hoping to protect your home and people, or a warrior striking back at tyrants both native and foreign, this 310-page hardcover guide to the Mwangi Expanse offers you the ultimate resource to explore a realm of magic, monsters, and intrigue! Lost Omens Mwangi Expanse ISBN978-1-64078-340-9 PZO9309$49.99 Lost Omens Mwangi Expanse Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-500-7 PZO9309-SE$79.99 73 PATHFINDER FLIP-MATS On tabletops around the world, the Flip-Mat revolution is changing the way players run their fantasy roleplaying games! Portable, durable, and affordable, Pathfinder Flip-Mats measure 24" × 30" unfolded and 8" × 10" folded. A Flip‑Mat’s coated surface can handle any dry-erase, wet-erase, or even permanent marker. Why spend your time sketching out scenery on a smudgy plastic mat when dynamic encounters and easy clean-up are just a flip away!
