These days, we’re focusing all our new Pathfinder releases on Pathfinder Second Edition, but many players out there still play and enjoy Pathfinder First Edition! Paizo is committed to keeping the bulk of our First Edition rulebooks in print in our popular paperback Pocket Edition format, and several items from the backlist remain strong sellers more than a decade after their original release! Complete your Pathfinder collection by starting at the very beginning, and keep the spirit of early Pathfinder alive forever! 76 PATHFINDER FIRST EDITION PATHFINDER FIRST EDITION POCKET EDITIONS Core Rulebook Advanced Player’s Guide Advanced Class Guide Advanced Race Guide Bestiary Bestiary 2 Bestiary 3 Bestiary 4 Bestiary 6 Monster Codex NPC Codex Villain Codex Horror Adventures Occult Adventures Ultimate Campaign Ultimate Combat Ultimate Intrigue Ultimate Wilderness PZO1110-PE PZO1115-PE PZO1129-PE PZO1121-PE PZO1112-PE PZO1116-PE PZO1120-PE PZO1127-PE PZO1137-PE PZO1130-PE PZO1124-PE PZO1136-PE PZO1135-PE PZO1132-PE PZO1125-PE PZO1118-PE PZO1134-PE PZO1140-PE 978-1-60125-887-8 978-1-60125-950-9 978-1-64078-007-1 978-1-64078-078-1 978-1-60125-888-5 978-1-60125-980-6 978-1-64078-006-4 978-1-64078-030-9 978-1-64078-159-7 978-1-64078-184-9 978-1-64078-077-4 978-1-64078-158-0 978-1-64078-185-6 978-1-64078-132-0 978-1-64078-104-7 978-1-64078-051-4 978-1-64078-105-4 978-1-64078-133-7 $24.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 $19.99 77 78 PAIZO GAMES PATHFINDER QUEST For many years, the farmers, loggers, and woodworkers of Falcon’s Hollow have lived a simple, prosperous life, despite dwelling in the shadow of Droskar’s Crag, a massive volcano that looms on the other side of Darkmoon Vale. The dungeons carved into that mountain were once a den for monsters that menaced the region, but they’ve lain quiet for over 10 years. Now, something stirs in the depths once more, causing the restless dead to pour forth and the mountain to belch smoke and ash, threatening every living person and creature in the Vale! Do you and your fellow adventurers have what it takes to turn the tide and get to the bottom of this mystery? In Pathfinder Quest, you make your own character by selecting from a diverse range of ancestries, backgrounds, and classes, giving you the skills and abilities needed to face off against the undead horde and discover what’s behind their sudden resurgence. Each session, you and your fellow players will undertake a single adventure, braving a series of encounters that form one part of a larger ongoing narrative. Throughout each adventure, you’ll face deadly foes and difficult challenges, as defined by the Adventure Book, but don’t expect to learn all the game’s secrets so easily! The consequences of your actions and choices are revealed in the Challenge Book only after you’ve made them, ensuring that there’s always another mystery to solve. As you play through the campaign, your characters will grow in power, gaining new feats and spells that enable you to face even more powerful foes and gather wondrous treasure. Throughout this campaign, your actions will shape the end of the story through the record of your deeds and the choices you’ve made! Pathfinder Quest Standard Edition (June) ISBN978-1-64078-761-2 PZO17001-BC$119.99 79 80 PAIZO GAMES PATHFINDER MONSTER MATCH! The only thing more dangerous than the denizens of the world of Pathfinder is Golarion’s monstrous dating scene! In Pathfinder Monster Match!, compete with your friends to court all kinds of curious creatures, from vivacious vampires and dashing dragons to… a sentient pile of ooze? Why not! When animus turns to amorousness, a whole new world of romantic possibilities opens up! Players will take their monstrous romantic prospects on a wide array of dates to get to know them better and give gifts to demonstrate their affection, all in hopes of finding their perfect match! Pathfinder Monster Match! supports 2 to 6 love-starved adventurers and takes about 20-30 minutes to play. The game includes 80 cards, 90 wooden heart tokens, and 84 MATCH! tokens. Pathfinder Monster Match! ISBN978-1-64078-741-4 PZO17002-BC$39.99 81 “Ferr-i-fl or-a!” “This spell turns flowers into iron, so they can’t be destroyed by a druid’s nature magic!” SPELLFINDER In Spellfinder, the silly, spell-slinging party game for 3—7 student wizards, players are taking their final exam at a prestigious magical university, mashing up magic words to create problem-solving spells! With thousands of possible scenarios and countless spells, you’ll have a blast coming up with zany magical solutions to the perils that plague high fantasy townsfolk—from mundane to mystical—and you’ll never play the same game twice! Spellfinder 82 PLAYERS 3-7 AGES 13+ TIME: 30 MINUTES ISBN978-1-64078-772-8 PZO17003-BC$39.99 PAIZO GAMES PATHFINDER DICE GODS Only the most favored of the gods can win the dice-drafting game Pathfinder Dice Gods! On your turn, pick one of 8 iconic gods from the Pathfinder pantheon and roll their unique 12-sided die, using symbols you get to play a variety of minigames, scoring points and chaining success into more success. Compete with up to 4 other players, using both luck and tactical play to win this fast-paced game of divine dominance. Pathfinder Dice Gods (August) PLAYERS 2–5 AGES 13+ TIME: 45 MINUTES ISBN978-1-64078-813-8 PZO17004-BC$49.99 83 HARNESS THE POWER OF THE ELEMENTS! Take on the role of an elemental sovereign, shaping the very nature of reality in this fast-moving game of token placement and pattern matching. With variable objectives and a game constantly in flux, you’ll never play the same way twice. And with a quick playtime, there’s always a chance for one more game… Pathfinder Elemental Stones 84 PLAYERS 2–4 AGES 13+ TIME: 40 MINUTES ISBN978-1-64078-546-5 PZO5504$39.99 PAIZO GAMES STARFINDER INFINITY DECK Though the original rules were lost in the period of galactic amnesia known as the Gap, people in the Pact Worlds and beyond have created all manner of games for this 65-card deck of playing cards. Four such games are presented in this box for a game night with friends and family—or for use in your Starfinder RPG campaigns! • Absalom Ante: A high-stakes betting game where you try to collect the best hand by taking tricks. • Salvage: Scour the wreck of a starship to collect the most valuable goods. • Mercenary 11: Jaunt between planets to complete more mercenary contracts than your opponents. • Contraband: Test your wits against another player to smuggle contraband items or catch them in the act of smuggling. Starfinder Infinity Deck PLAYERS 1-5 AGES 13+ TIME: 15-30 MINUTES ISBN978-1-64078-725-4 PZO27001-BC$34.99 85 OPERATION HELLMOUTH—A PATHFINDER NOVEL Valeros is a veteran adventurer whose life as a mercenary lies far in his past. When military conflict erupts, however, more aspects of Valeros’s past come crashing into the present day. Now, separated from his longtime adventuring companions by a burgeoning war and vast distances, Valeros must rely on new allies to prevent a diabolic dragon’s sinister machinations from coming to fruition. In an exciting race against the clock, Valeros must make himself part of the crew of the Wandering Star, under the command of former pirate and current Andoren operative Torius Vin, hoping to reach the site of a nascent Hellmouth—a living portal to Hell—before a dragon can use it and a sliver of a slain god to upset the balance of power in the region. With the aid of the enigmatic sorcerer and spy Vee, the naga oracle Celeste, and a young Eagle Knight with her own ties to Valeros’s past, the iconic fighter and the crew of Wandering Star must overcome the forces of Hell with the fate of Golarion hanging in the balance. From fan-favorite fantasy author Chris A. Jackson (Pirate’s Honor, Pirate’s Promise, Pirate’s Prophecy), Operation Hellmouth promises an unforgettable adventure of infernal plotting and family drama on the high seas, set in the award-winning Age of Lost Omens setting for the Pathfinder Roleplaying Game. Operation Hellmouth is the perfect entry point to the Hellfire Crisis event within the Pathfinder setting, a multi-year conflict that will pull the world’s most powerful nations into all-out war. Operation Hellmouth (hardcover) ISBN978-1-64078-722-3 PZO18005-HC$29.99 Operation Hellmouth (e-book) ISBN978-1-64078-723-0 PZO18005E$9.99 Operation Hellmouth (audiobook) ISBN978-1-64078-724-7 PZO18005-AU$24.95 86 PATHFINDER FICTION ABOMINATION VAULTS—A PATHFINDER NOVEL Five hundred years ago, a band of adventurers known as the Roseguard defeated a powerful sorcerer named Belcorra Haruvex, foiling her plot to destroy the teeming metropolis of Absalom. But this victory came with a great sacrifice, and the surviving members of the Roseguard founded the town of Otari near the site of their battle, naming it after their fallen comrade. Now, the lens atop Belcorra’s Gauntlight once again gleams with eldritch power, and it falls to a new Roseguard to prevent the sorcerer’s plans from finally coming to pass. For ambitious dwarven bard, Cade, this is a chance to finally make a name for herself and earn acceptance into the Pathfinder Society, while veteran adventurer and Pathfinder Ezren may find himself in over his head as he strives both to uncover the mystery of Gauntlight Keep and the Abomination Vaults below, and keep Cade alive as she takes her first steps toward a life of adventure. The most popular megadungeon in Pathfinder’s Lost Omens setting is now an exciting novel from veteran author Erik Scott de Bie. Whether you’ve experienced the Abomination Vaults as a player, Game Master, in the action RPG video game adaptation from BKOM Studios, or you’re new to the famed vaults of madness, this exciting novel is for you! Abomination Vaults (hardcover) (November) ISBN978-1-64078-841-1 PZO18006-HC  $29.99 Abomination Vaults (e-book) (November) ISBN978-1-64078-842-8 PZO18006E  $9.99 Abomination Vaults (audiobook) (November) ISBN978-1-64078-843-5 PZO18006-AU  $24.95 87 Starfinder is a galaxy-spanning science-fantasy RPG that allows players to experience a unique blend of magic and technology as they travel to exotic worlds, encounter strange civilizations, and delve into ancient ruins, all in the distant future of the Pathfinder setting. Blast off into a galaxy of adventure with the Starfinder Roleplaying Game! Step into your powered armor and grab your magic-infused laser pistol as you investigate the mysteries of a weird universe with your bold starship crew. Will you delve for lost artifacts in the ruins of an alien temple? Strap on rune-enhanced armor and a laser rifle to battle undead empires in their fleets of bone ships? Defend colonists from a swarm of ravenous monsters? Maybe you’ll hack into the mainframe of a god-run corporation or search the stars for clues to the secret history of the universe. Whether you’re making first contact with new cultures on uncharted worlds or fighting to survive in the neon-lit back alleys of Absalom Station, you and your team will need all your wits, combat skill, and magic to make it through. But most of all, you’ll need each other. 88 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME With regularly released rulebooks, adventures, accessories, and maps, Starfinder provides deep support for both players and GMs. It’s an infinite universe out there, and Starfinder RPG products are your portal to exploring every parsec of it! 89 2026 STARFINDER RELEASES 90 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME January August Flip-Mat: Imperial Bases February Absalom Station HC, SE, SK Critical Hit Deck Novel: Assault on Absalom Alien Core Pocket Edition Alien Core Token Box September March Secrets of the Swarm Adventure Path HC, SE Flip-Mat: Absalom Station Multi-Pack Flip-Mat: Cantina October April Tech Core HC, SE, SK Galactic Ancestries HC, SE, SK November May Condition Cards Deck Tales from the Vast Adventure Anthology HC, SE Flip-Mat: Vast Worlds Multi-Pack June Fumble Deck Flip-Mat: Player Starship December Absalom Station PE Rescue on Raxil (Free RPG Day Adventure) July Galactic Ancestries PE Flip-Mat: Iconic Starship—Nova Rush ACRONYM KEY: HC hardcover; PE softcover pocket edition; SE special edition; SK retailer retro cover edition. 91 92 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME STARFINDER PLAYER CORE Starfinder Player Core is the definitive entry point for Starfinder Second Edition, packed with everything a player needs to learn how to play the game! Choose from 10 ancestries, six character classes, and hundreds of feats and spells to create unique characters ready to venture out into a ruthless galaxy awash with magic and opportunity. Starfinder Player Core brings Starfinder into its new edition and is now 100% compatible with the acclaimed Second Edition of the hit Pathfinder Roleplaying Game. This book, together with GM Core, Alien Core, and Tech Core, provides a new foundation for the future of tabletop gaming! Starfinder Player Core includes: • Complete character creation rules, walking you through building a character by selecting your Ancestry, Background, and Class, with a focus on the envoy, mystic, operative, solarian, soldier, and witchwarper! Core ancestry options include android, barathu, human, kasatha, lashunta, pahtra, shirren, skittermander, vesk, and ysoki! • A vast array of options allowing you to customize your character, including versatile heritages like the undead borai and Drift-touched prismeni, skills and feats, and hundreds of spells, ensuring that the character you build represents your hero not just in story, but in rules as well! • A primer on the Pact Worlds and wider galaxy, so your character can be a part of an exciting and diverse setting! • Rules and tools to advance your character through play, taking them from a fresh-faced adventurer ready to take on the world to a veteran hero, wielding powerful magic that can reshape reality. Starfinder Player Core ISBN978-1-64078-686-8 PZO22001-HC$69.99 Starfinder Player Core Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-688-2 PZO22001-SK$69.99 Starfinder Player Core Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-687-5 PZO22001-SE$89.99 Starfinder Player Core Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-709-4 PZO22001-PE$29.99 93 94 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME STARFINDER GM CORE Unleash your imagination, creating new galaxies and tales with Starfinder GM Core for Starfinder Second Edition! This comprehensive 264-page rulebook gives Game Masters everything they need to craft thrilling tales of adventure, from a single-night’s mission on the mean streets to complex epics spanning years. Within these pages, you’ll find clear guidelines for creating new hazards and alien creatures, tools to design challenging, balanced encounters, and rules for rewarding characters for facing the dastardly challenges you array before them! It also contains rules for quick-to-run cinematic starship combat and dynamic hacking! Starfinder GM Core is the second core rulebook for the Starfinder Second Edition RPG! Along with Player Core, Alien Core, and Tech Core, this book is a critical piece of the new foundation for the future of tabletop gaming! Starfinder GM Core includes: • The rules needed to run a game of Starfinder, including guidelines for creating challenging encounters, determining success, and giving out rewards. • Advice aimed at making you an incredible Game Master, along with tools to ensure you and everyone else at your table has a safe and enjoyable experience. • Guidelines to help you create your own content, from campaigns and adventures to hazards and monsters. • Rules subsystems to help you handle a wide array of game situations, including rules for chases, cinematic starship combat, research, hacking infiltration, and more! • A guide to the Pact Worlds and wider galaxy, with a look at several important regions and an exploration of the wider cosmos! Starfinder GM Core ISBN978-1-64078-699-8 PZO22002-HC$69.99 Starfinder GM Core Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-701-8 PZO22002-SK$69.99 Starfinder GM Core Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-700-1 PZO22002-SE$89.99 Starfinder GM Core Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-710-0 PZO22002-PE$29.99 95 96 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME STARFINDER ALIEN CORE Inside Starfinder Alien Core, you’ll find over 200 creatures, including science fantasy favorites like robots, spacefaring fey, and all-new dragons; alien beasts from friendly spiderlike empathnids to fearsome plantlike predator ksariks; and unique monsters that threaten the galaxy of Starfinder, like jinsul troopers and vicious Swarm subspecies. You’ll also find legacy Pathfinder creatures with a sci-fi update, like nanite-infused alghollthus, and Starfinder classics like akatas and laser wolves. These creatures cover all levels of play, from scavenging sluglike diathas to powerful Drift-dwelling spectra. Fully compatible with Pathfinder Second Edition! Starfinder Alien Core includes: • Over 200 individual alien write-ups, including common foes, like glitch-spawning gremlins, robots programmed for assassination, and mindless cybernetic zombies, to unique creatures that can threaten even the most experienced interstellar explorers, such as Akiton’s dreaded illumantula and the giant Castrovelian ooze known as the Terror or Ukulam! • Representative combatants from some of the Starfinder setting’s most iconic organizations, including the Azlanti Star Empire’s Aeon Guards, the imperious Hellknights, nature- loving Xenowardens, the undead crew of the infamous Corpse Fleet, and more! • Simple creature adjustments that allow you to customize a monster, tuning its power level or theme with just a few quick alterations. • Guidelines for reading and using alien statistics, ensuring you get the most out of a creature both in and out of combat. • Lists of creatures sorted by both type and level, making it easy to find the alien you need when you need it. Starfinder Alien Core ISBN978-1-64078-713-1 PZO22003-HC$64.99 Starfinder Alien Core Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-715-5 PZO22003-SK$64.99 Starfinder Alien Core Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-714-8 PZO22003-SE$84.99 Starfinder Alien Core Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-764-3 PZO22003-PE$29.99 97 98 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME STARFINDER GALAXY GUIDE Blast off into Starfinder Second Edition with a star chart of the galaxy and a thrilling tour of adventuring locations across the vastness of interstellar space! The Starfinder Galaxy Guide is a primer designed for new and experienced players that explores popular types of science fantasy campaigns— galactic exploration, horror, war-torn space opera, and more—giving GMs and players tools for playing out those types of stories in their Starfinder game. The Galaxy Guide also introduces several powerful galactic factions as potential friends or foes, including AbadarCorp’s holy corporate empire, the infernal orders of the Hellknights, and the world-preserving Xenowardens. Each major faction includes a new archetype players can use to create a character with ties to that faction. The galactic tour ends with a database of playable alien ancestries, including a telepathic mega-brain with an atrophied body (contemplative), a friendly shapeshifter with a secretly bizarre true form (astrazoan), and more! The Starfinder Galaxy Guide includes: • A double-sided map featuring the Starfinder galaxy and the Pact Worlds system. • Six new playable alien ancestries: astrazoan, contemplative, dragonkin, kalo, sarcesian, and vlaka. • Six new archetypes related to powerful galactic factions. • Exciting new lore introducing new gods, current events, and important hotspots in the Starfinder setting! Starfinder Galaxy Guide ISBN978-1-64078-663-9 PZO22004-HC$59.99 Starfinder Galaxy Guide Hobby Retailer Edition ISBN978-1-64078-665-3 PZO22004-SK$59.99 Starfinder Galaxy Guide Special Edition ISBN978-1-64078-664-6 PZO22004-SE$79.99 Starfinder Galaxy Guide Pocket Edition ISBN978-1-64078-703-2 PZO22004-PE$29.99 99 100 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME STARFINDER GALACTIC ANCESTRIES This 224-page rulebook is packed full of playable alien ancestries for Starfinder Second Edition games, including 21 brand new options like the lucky blue worlanisi, sentient rollerball bantrid, or even a blazing miniature sun called a novian. In addition to this intergalactic cast of science-fantasy species are a host of stellar options for familiar ancestries, including Starfinder favorites like reptilian vesk and insectoid shirrens, and fantasy classics like gnomes, elves, and goblins in space! On top of that, the brand-new Gap- touched versatile heritage connects players to the history-breaking event at the heart of the Starfinder setting while giving them special abilities, and the xenometric android allows readers to create robotic versions of any Starfinder alien, not just humans! As with all Starfinder Second Edition material, Starfinder Galactic Ancestries is fully compatible with Pathfinder Second Edition, allowing players and Game Masters to incorporate interstellar options into their favorite fantasy campaign! What exciting alien character are you going to play first? Starfinder Galactic Ancestries (April) ISBN978-1-64078-781-0 PZO22005-HC$64.99 Starfinder Galactic Ancestries Retailer Edition (April) ISBN978-1-64078-775-9 PZO22005-SK$64.99 Starfinder Galactic Ancestries Special Edition (April) ISBN978-1-64078-777-3 PZO22005-SE$84.99 Starfinder Galactic Ancestries Pocket Edition (July) ISBN978-1-64078-802-2 PZO22005-PE$29.99 101 STARFINDER ABSALOM STATION Absalom Station is a famous port of call at the center of the galaxy. It’s a place where worlds and cultures collide, and where danger and opportunity lurk around every corner. This 164-page hardcover rulebook presents new player options, GM tools, and lore for creating Starfinder adventures on Absalom Station or anywhere in the galaxy! Starfinder Absalom Station includes: • An astounding array of foes and friends likely to show up on a space station. • Campaign-ready information about culture, lodging, and travel on Absalom Station, including new lore about the station’s infamous districts and neighborhoods. • Four new archetypes for the Aspis Consortium, Ghost Couriers, Eyeswide Agency, and Stewards factions. • Two new playable species: The mysterious bovine humanoids called nuar, and the aberrant collectors known as gnarefuroids. 102 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME Starfinder Absalom Station (August) ISBN978-1-64078-817-6 PZO22007-HC$49.99 Starfinder Absalom Station Retailer Edition (August) ISBN978-1-64078-819-0 PZO22007-SK$49.99 Starfinder Absalom Station Special Edition (August) ISBN978-1-64078-818-3 PZO22007-SE$69.99 Starfinder Absalom Station Pocket Edition (December) ISBN978-1-64078-847-3 PZO22006-PE$29.99 103 104 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME STARFINDER TECH CORE Tech Core has everything you need to upgrade your Starfinder game! This 264-page rulebook introduces two tech-savvy classes, the artificially enhanced mechanic and the magic-hacking technomancer. It also features tactical starship combat, with new rules for building, crewing, and upgrading starships, plus hordes of sample foes, hazards, and plenty of GM tools for running your own tactical space battle. Starfinder Tech Core includes: • New archetypes including the nanite-controlling nanocyte and resourceful junkomancer. • New high-tech ancestries and versatile heritages, including robotic SROs, living holograms and cyborgs. • Rules for building and controlling your own tech companions! • New feats designed to interact with technology! • An arsenal of new gear including armor, weapons, upgrades, and augmentations—even magic items! • New high-tech spells. • Sample starship enemies and hazards. Starfinder Tech Core (October) ISBN978-1-64078-831-2 PZO22006-HC$69.99 Starfinder Tech Core Retailer Edition (October) ISBN978-1-64078-833-6 PZO22006-SK$69.99 Starfinder Tech Core Special Edition (October) ISBN978-1-64078-832-9 PZO22006-SE$89.99 105 STARFINDER COMBAT PAD Maintain the flow of combat with the Starfinder Combat Pad initiative tracker! Usable with Starfinder & Pathfinder, or any other roleplaying game, this board includes magnets that stick right to it. List the names of heroes and foes on the magnets using a wet- or dry-erase marker, then place them in initiative order. Easily track when a character delays their turn or starts dying by sliding the magnets. Take the uncertainty out of battle with the Starfinder Combat Pad! The Starfinder Combat Pad includes: • 1 double-sided magnetic wet- and dry-erase board, with areas to write initiative numbers, track durations, and keep notes! • 2 sheets of magnets, including: 34 red enemy magnets, 18 blue player character magnets, 14 green nonplayer character magnets, 4 gray hazard magnets, 8 arrows in different colors for tracking turns and durations, and 4 condition magnets in different colors. Starfinder Combat Pad ISBN978-1-64078-689-9 PZO20003-MC$24.99 106 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME STARFINDER PLAYER CHARACTER FOLIO Keep critical character details at your fingertips with the Starfinder Player Character Folio! This comprehensive character record resource provides room for everything you need to know about your Starfinder Second Edition character’s abilities and exploits. This sturdy folio’s 8 character-defining pages include: • Expanded space for your character’s ability scores, feats, and class features. • A diagram to help fill every item slot, including augmentations! • Room to chronicle your character’s achievements, goals, and history. • Quick reference charts to character advancement. • Tons of space to track gear. • Folder-flaps to hold handouts and other documents. ... and much, much more! Starfinder Player Character Folio ISBN978-1-64078-702-5 PZO20002-SC$14.99 107 STARFINDER GM SCREEN Launch your game into overdrive with the Starfinder GM Screen. This sturdy four-panel horizontal screen features a stunning battle scene by legendary artist Ben Wootten on one side and handy charts and game tables on the other side to give a busy GM everything they need to run a Starfinder game! Whether you need to quickly reference a rule or simply keep your star charts and other plans secured from players’ scanning eyes, the Starfinder GM Screen has you covered. The Starfinder GM Screen measures 44” by 8.5”, giving you plenty of space to hide your notes, dice rolls, and secret plans. Starfinder GM Screen ISBN 978-1-64078-716-2 PZO20001-MC$24.99 108 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME STARFINDER ALIEN CORE TOKEN BOX Printed on sturdy cardstock, each of the hundreds of double-sided creature tokens included in this collection contains a beautiful full-color image of an alien enemy or ally from Starfinder Alien Core. The tokens fit perfectly on Starfinder and Pathfinder Flip-Mats or any other 1”-grid battle map. Starfinder Alien Core Token Box ISBN978-1-64078-763-6 PZO20004-MC$59.99 109 STARFINDER CONDITION CARDS DECK These 108 cards include rules for the Starfinder Second Edition conditions, with prominent reminder text you can read at a glance. Multiple copies of the most crucial conditions mean there are enough for the whole table, and a set of tracking cards lets you easily monitor condition values and durations! Starfinder Condition Cards Deck (May) ISBN978-1-64078-784-1 PZO20005-MC$19.99 110 STARFINDER ROLEPLAYING GAME STARFINDER CRITICAL HIT DECK Tired of plain old double damage? After you score a critical hit, draw a card and apply one of three different effects based on attack type. These cards are designed to work with Starfinder Second Edition and can be used by players and GMs alike. Starfinder Critical Hit Deck (August) ISBN978-1-64078-820-6 PZO20006-MC$14.99 STARFINDER FUMBLE DECK When you roll a 1 on an attack, simply draw a card and apply one of three different effects based on attack type. These cards are designed to work with Starfinder Second Edition and can be used by players and GMs alike. Failing miserably has never been more fun! Starfinder Fumble Deck (November) ISBN978-1-64078-844-2 PZO20007-MC$14.99 111 112 STARFINDER ADVENTURES GUILT OF THE GRAVE WORLD ADVENTURE PATH The first Adventure Path of Starfinder Second Edition! While working for a dwarven mining collective on a mysterious asteroid, a group of adventurers discover an ancient secret that puts them at odds with the dreaded undead space armada known as the Corpse Fleet! Can the heroes survive the trials that await them on the grave world and beyond, or will they be the first victims of the Corpse Fleet’s ambitions of turning the galaxy into a cosmic graveyard? This 128-page hardcover space opera campaign spans levels 1 to 5, with roughly one level of epic adventure in each of its five parts. Written by Michael Bramnik. Guilt of the Grave World Adventure Path ISBN978-16407-8711-7 PZO24006-HC$44.99 Guilt of the Grave World Special Edition ISBN978-16407-8712-4 PZO24006-SE$64.99 113 114 STARFINDER ADVENTURES SECRETS OF THE SWARM ADVENTURE PATH The Szandite Collective is a peaceful federation of worlds connected by magical crystals. When planet Krethiskar fell silent, the galaxy’s worst fears came true. The destructive Swarm had annihilated Krethiskar’s defenses and transformed the world into an incubator for future generations of hive-mind-controlled shock troops. This time, the Swarm isn’t simply annihilating everything in their path—they might just be converting their conquests into terrifying new weapons! This 144-page hardcover adventure includes a complete Starfinder campaign for character levels 6–10. The book also includes a stellar rules appendix that offers new playable ancestries, magic items, and monsters designed to deploy into your Starfinder game! Secrets of the Swarm Adventure Path (September) ISBN978-1-64078-824-4 PZO24009-HC$49.99 Secrets of the Swarm Special Edition (September) ISBN978-1-64078-825-1 PZO24009-SE$69.99 115 TALES FROM THE VAST ADVENTURE ANTHOLOGY Explore a pristine planet in a magically warped sector! Survive a haunted supply depot in deep space! Infiltrate a vault inside a false moon occupied by a uniquely out‑of‑touch community! Fight back against an imperial invasion on a distant world! This 128-page hardback features four adventures taking place in the most unpredictable part of the galaxy where anything can happen! Tales from the Vast is designed to be played back-to-back as a campaign from 1st through 9th level, or each adventure can be played separately as a one-shot. Tales from the Vast Adventure Anthology (May) ISBN978-1-64078-789-6 PZO24007-HC$44.99 Tales from the Vast Special Edition (May) ISBN978-1-64078-790-2 PZO24007-SE $ 64.99 116 STARFINDER ADVENTURES STARFINDER MURDER IN METAL CITY The first deluxe adventure for Starfinder Second Edition is here! A strange message invites six strangers to Striving, an expansive megaplex city on Aballon, the planet of machines. There, they gather in a neon-lit establishment, surrounded by androids and robots, to meet an old friend—who just so happens to have recently been murdered. This grim discovery unites the strangers into a crew of unlikely investigators! If they want to find the killer, they’ll need to outrun murderous robots, outwit clever foes, and analyze perplexing clues—all while wondering whether they’re hunting the murderer or the murderer is hunting them. Murder in Metal City is a premium boxed‑set adventure for Starfinder Second Edition. It includes six pregenerated 1st-level characters and everything else the players and GM need to run the adventure, from tokens and battle maps to special handouts, item cards, enemy statistics, and more. Murder in Metal City includes: • Six new pregenerated characters with player handouts, one for each class from Starfinder Player Core. • A double-sided combat map featuring key locations from the adventure. • Articles about the machine planet Aballon and the megaplex city of Striving, plus a double-sided poster map detailing each location. • One new playable alien ancestry: khizars, the plant- like protectors of Aballon’s jungle-filled Ice Wells. • An article detailing the tech faiths of the Starfinder universe, from deities like Triune and Lambatuin to the unique philosophies of the robotic anacites. Starfinder Murder in Metal City Deluxe Adventure ISBN978-1-64078-690-5 PZO24005-BX$39.99 117 ASSAULT ON ABSALOM STATION—A STARFINDER NOVEL Seven years after the galaxy awoke from a period of collective amnesia known as the Gap, the citizens of Absalom Station have established a new normalcy living at the hub of recently discovered interstellar Drift travel. But all is not well for the founding members of the Starfinder Society, as tensions between the living and undead inhabitants of the station come to a violent head. Now, the undead starships of the Corpse Fleet and invading troops from the dead world of Eox besiege the station, threatening everything the station’s inhabitants have built. Can famed android explorer Tyrcell and their companions survive the chaos of the Magefire Assault and restore order to Absalom Station or will this be the end of their Society and home? Centuries later, what horrors of war will fledgling Starfinders Chk Chk and Dae discover as they pry into the past? From Hugo Award-winning author Tim Pratt comes a sequel to the fan-favorite Starfinder novel, Era of the Eclipse, detailing another key moment in the history of the Starfinder Roleplaying Game’s Pact Worlds setting—a moment not all of the Starfinder Society’s founders will survive! Assault on Absalom Station (hardcover) (August) ISBN978-1-64078-814-5 PZO28002-HC$29.99 Assault on Absalom Station (e-book) (August) ISBN978-1-64078-815-2 PZO28002E$9.99 Assault on Absalom Station (audiobook) (August) ISBN978-1-64078-816-9 PZO28002-AU$24.95 118 STARFINDER FICTION ERA OF THE ECLIPSE—A STARFINDER NOVEL Everything has a beginning, even the death of history. When two novice Starfinders, the energetic Dae and somber Chk Chk, make a startling discovery, they unlock a link to one of the galaxy’s most momentous events: the Gap and the disappearance of the now-lost world of Golarion. Shrouded in mystery, the Gap ended with mortals across the cosmos suddenly finding themselves with memories stripped from their minds without warning or explanation. The android Tyrcell wakes up on Absalom Station, the core of the Starfinder setting, on the day after the Gap. With their memories wiped, they contend with chaos on the station while surviving and building a coalition of memory-addled allies. All the while, other forces begin to wake after the cosmic event and enact plans of their own. From the undead media mogul, Zo!, who seeks to capitalize on the event, to the fiendish servants known as Hellknights, there’s no shortage of opportunists as the galaxy reels! Both stories collide as the Starfinder agents and Tyrcell, separated by centuries, uncover a gift left to mortals by Yaraesa, goddess of knowledge and science. This secret could unravel the truth of the Gap, but in the days following the event, the nascent Hellknight Order of the Eclipse will stop at nothing to control exactly what that message is. Meanwhile, in the modern age, a mysterious figure trails the Starfinders as they follow in Tyrcell’s footsteps… From Hugo Award-winning author Tim Pratt (City of the Fallen Sky, Reign of Stars, Liar’s Blade) comes the definitive starting point to the award‑winning, science fantasy setting of the Starfinder Roleplaying Game. Experience firsthand the days after the Gap when history disappeared, and follow in the footsteps of Starfinder’s newest iconic characters as they rush to uncover the truth behind Starfinder’s greatest mystery! Era of the Eclipse (hardcover) ISBN978-1-64078-696-7 PZO28001-HC$29.99 Era of the Eclipse (e-book) ISBN978-1-64078-697-4 PZO28001E$14.99 Era of the Eclipse (audiobook) ISBN978-1-64078-698-1 PZO28001-AU$24.95 119 STARFINDER FLIP-MATS On tabletops around the world, the Flip-Mat revolution is changing the way players run their science-fantasy roleplaying games! Portable, durable, and affordable, Starfinder Flip-Mats measure 24" × 30" unfolded and 8" × 10" folded. A Flip-Mat’s coated surface can handle any dry-erase, wet-erase, or even permanent marker. Why take the time to sketch out all that scenery on a smudgy plastic mat when dynamic encounters and easy clean-up are just a flip away! 120 STARFINDER FLIP-MAT Starfinder Flip-Mats Flip-Mat: Basic Terrain Flip-Mat: Basic Starfield Flip-Mat: Space Station Flip-Mat: Asteroid Flip-Mat: Ghost Ship Flip-Mat: Hospital Flip-Mat: Jungle World Flip-Mat: Warship Flip-Mat: Spaceport Flip-Mat: Ice World
